---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a capability or change
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do that the project does not support today? Describe the
use case, not just the feature.

## Proposed solution

What you would like to see. If it touches the resolver, gateway surface, or a
wire format, sketch the shape.

## Trust / correctness impact

Does this affect verification, header anchoring, the envelope parser, or the
proof bundle format? If so, how does it preserve the invariants in
CONTRIBUTING.md (byte-order discipline, ord parity, mandatory `txCount`, L2/L3
assurances, zero-IO core)?

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you weighed and why you set them aside.

## Additional context

Links, prior art, related issues.
